recent_calls.summary: The user called to schedule an appointment but decided to call back during regular business hours instead of scheduling now. The agent provided office hours and offered to take information for a callback, but the user declined and chose to call back later.

The call was initiated by the user but due to unintelligible audio and lack of response, the agent was unable to assist. The agent attempted to engage the user but the call ended without any meaningful interaction.

The user called back after hours to report that their AC fan is not turning on. The agent collected the user's contact information, service address, and preferred callback time for early next business day. The user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs, and the agent confirmed a follow-up call would be made.

The user, Megan Putnam, called to follow up on a previous request for commercial water heater service after not receiving a callback. The agent documented the request and assured Megan that the team will follow up on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

The user called to confirm an appointment for tomorrow at 10 AM with a live person. The agent explained that live transfers are not available after-hours but documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further assistance needed.

The user, Susan, called after hours requesting to speak with Gigi and asked for a callback the next day. The agent informed her that Gigi was unavailable but documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended politely with no further requests from the user.

April Weatherly called to schedule a follow-up service appointment for her air conditioner that is still not working. The agent confirmed the appointment preference for tomorrow afternoon and verified the contact details and service address. April declined information about maintenance programs and providing feedback, and the call ended with the agent confirming that the team will reach out to confirm the appointment.

Justin called to request a quote for replacing a water heater with an expansion tank and a full HVAC unit for a small apartment. The agent confirmed details, noted the service address and contact information, and scheduled a follow-up for early morning, with Justin planning to call back to schedule the service. The agent also offered information about maintenance programs, which Justin accepted, and the call ended positively with Justin providing excellent feedback.

The user, Kay, called after hours wanting to set an appointment with a technician on a work order. The agent, Evie, informed Kay that a live agent was unavailable but documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended with no further questions from the user.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to follow up on the progress of their hiring process and the next interview. The agent informed the user that they cannot access hiring details but assured that the message would be passed to the appropriate team and that someone would follow up on the next business day. The call ended with the user declining further assistance.

Mary Brennan called to report that her air conditioner is not cooling properly and expressed concern about the issue. The agent identified as an after-hours assistant and clarified the nature of the call, but the user decided to wait until the next day for further assistance. The call ended without a service appointment being scheduled.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user called and requested to speak with Cece. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate person.

The user, Scott McKechner, called to inquire about the time window for an AC appointment scheduled for the next day. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent.
The agent called the user to check in or follow up, but the user indicated they did not want to engage. The call was then transferred to another number as per the agent's action.
The user called to return a call from CG and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The user called to inquire about the arrival time of a service or person and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to schedule a home warranty appointment for heating and cooling service because their system was not cooling. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the information, and the user declined additional maintenance program information. The user provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The user called looking for Miss Nicole or Amy, and the agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent by transferring the call. The call was successfully transferred to another number.
The user requested to speak with Miss Nicole, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call lasted 21 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to discuss a callback regarding their furnace and AC bids and wanted to ask questions to finalize the situation. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Keith, called to speak with someone who could help him close a deal related to heating and air services. The agent, Sophie, transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was successful.

The user called to request a bid for preventative maintenance on heating and cooling systems at a specific property in Saint Louis. The agent collected detailed information including the service address, user's name, role, contact details, preferred maintenance date, and how the user heard about the company. The call ended after confirming the summary with the user.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another representative successfully. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another representative. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.

The user inquired about purchasing air conditioning parts, and the agent explained that Budget does not sell parts directly but offers full-service HVAC repairs, replacements, and installations. The call ended shortly after this exchange.

The user called to report that their air conditioner was not cooling and making noises, describing it as a comfort issue rather than an emergency. The agent collected the user's information and attempted to schedule a service appointment, but the call quality was poor, leading to a transfer to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to find out why someone from a specific number had called them and requested to speak with an agent. The initial agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent who could assist further and successfully transferred the call.

The user, Dalila Brimley, called to arrange a replacement for her air conditioner due to ongoing issues and provided a home warranty dispatch number. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that the team would follow up shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user called to inquire about a previous call they received. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user requested to speak to a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called back for Susie and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 16 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user reported an issue with their basement air conditioner's water not draining properly and requested a cooling service appointment. The agent successfully booked a service appointment for Thursday at 2 PM and confirmed the details with the user. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.

Constance Myers called to inquire about the scheduling of a home service appointment. The agent confirmed her details but found no appointment on file and offered to transfer her to a live representative, which she accepted. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

The user called to inquire about the service visit pricing and availability for an air conditioning repair. The agent explained that there is usually a service call fee for the initial diagnosis and that availability is open for today and tomorrow, but exact costs depend on location and warranty. The user decided not to schedule an appointment and ended the call.

The user called to schedule a meeting with Nick to discuss potential business partnership opportunities related to AT&T business services. The agent collected the user's contact details and assured that Nick or the team would reach out as soon as possible. The user declined information about maintenance programs and did not provide feedback.

The call was initiated by the user and answered by Sophie, Budget's assistant. After brief greetings and confirming communication, Sophie attempted to transfer the user to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred.

Aaron Spencer called to follow up on a previous request regarding the south roof rooftop unit. The agent confirmed the issue and updated Aaron's contact number to ensure the team can provide a service update. The call ended with the agent assuring a human agent will follow up soon.
The user requested to speak to a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.

The user, Brenda, called to inquire about getting her AC worked on under a warranty claim. After confirming the nature of the service request, the agent transferred the call to a live agent named Amy for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about the cost and availability for a technician to inspect an intermittently shutting off blower in their parents' air conditioning system. The agent provided pricing information and availability but the user decided to call other places before scheduling. The call ended with the user thanking the agent and no appointment being made.

Joe Lucero called to report water leaking from his air conditioner, soaking the carpet and causing the AC to malfunction. The agent confirmed the details and attempted to transfer Joe to an emergency specialist, but the transfer failed. The agent assured Joe that his issue was escalated and an emergency specialist would call him back promptly, typically within the same day.

Karen from American Home Shield called Sophie at Budget regarding a dispatch assigned to Budget that had not been completed since July 2nd. Sophie acknowledged the issue and transferred Karen to a live agent who could assist further.

The user called and was confused about the identity of the caller, asking for clarification. The agent introduced herself as Sophie from Budget Heating, Cooling and Plumbing, but the call ended shortly after without further interaction.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after a brief exchange with the agent, Sophie, who attempted to assist William. The conversation did not progress to any specific request or resolution.
